text: My grandparents are on Maple Ave and need medication picked up before tonight. Phones are dying.
Community center has 12 families. We are almost out of baby formula and phone chargers.
Road blocked near Lincoln school entrance. Not sure if anyone is hurt.
Heard the bridge is collapsing near 7th. Not confirmed, friend told me.
I can do supply deliveries for the next 2 hours. I have a van.
Can someone check on Mrs. Alvarez at 18 Maple? Her oxygen machine battery is low.
A resident says wires are down near the alley behind Lincoln school. They are sparking.
Shelter desk says we need diapers sizes 2 and 4, wipes, and baby formula by tonight.
Someone posted that the high school shelter is full. I cannot verify it.
Man in a blue truck offered to take people through the closed fire road. Sounds unsafe.
Need blankets in the quiet room. Older adults are cold because heat is off.
Delivery driver reports south entrance has smoke drifting across it. Visibility changes every few minutes.
I found a lost backpack at the shelter desk. Not urgent.
Please send insulin to everyone at Maple, maybe double doses because roads may close.
We confirmed the library bus stop is active until 8pm; needs Spanish announcement.
